actions.text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.

official_title: To authorize grants to establish a national education protection and advocacy program to enforce the rights and protections under the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act, the Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990, and section 504 of the Rehabilitation Act of 1973, and for other purposes.
short_title: Protection and Advocacy for Student Success Act

titles.title: Protection and Advocacy for Student Success Act
Protection and Advocacy for Student Success Act

To authorize grants to establish a national education protection and advocacy program to enforce the rights and protections under the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act, the Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990, and section 504 of the Rehabilitation Act of 1973, and for other purposes.
